---
title: "Model"
format: html
---
```{r}
#getting rid of the data we will not be using in the model
#loading in the necessary package
library(dplyr)

```

```{r}
# Load in start stuff
library(brms) # for statistics
library(tidyverse)
library(ggeffects) # for the prediction plot
```

```{r}
library(brms)
read.csv("Whale_Data_Filtered.csv")

fit <- brm(
  cbind(resting, traveling, foraging, exploring) ~ group,
  data = Whale_Data_Filtered,
  family = multinomial(),
  chains = 4,
  cores = 4,
  iter = 4000
)
```
